The integer underflow issue was occurring in the `fill_nfapi_dlsch_config` function at line 1668 in `/repo/openair2/LAYER2/MAC/eNB_scheduler_primitives.c`.

- When -1 is interpreted as unsigned, it becomes 65535, causing integer underflow and potential out-of-bounds access
